findings: Defect verified at scripts/keel-watch.cjs line 96: staleCheck() HALTED warning instructs 'resume (keel-state.cjs resume <story> --phase <N> --notes "...")' — bare path, unresolvable after v3.9 moved the engine to ~/.keel/bin/.
Defect verified at scripts/keel-state.cjs line 156: notifyHalt() Slack message body instructs 'node keel-state.cjs resume <story> --phase <N> --notes "..."' — same bare unresolvable path.
Human-reported failure mode: a user running either instructed command from an arbitrary cwd gets 'module not found' because keel-state.cjs is not at a bare relative path post-v3.9 migration.
Required fix per human PO: both messages must instruct 'node ~/.keel/bin/keel-state.cjs resume <story> --phase <N> --notes "..."'.
AC-1 (verbatim): The stale-check HALTED warning in keel-watch.cjs instructs `node ~/.keel/bin/keel-state.cjs resume <story> --phase <N> --notes "..."`.
AC-2 (verbatim): The Slack halt notification text in keel-state.cjs instructs `node ~/.keel/bin/keel-state.cjs resume <story> --phase <N> --notes "..."`.
Scope is message-text-only in two files; no behavioral or control-flow change is requested.
decisions: intake transcribed from direct human defect report, not authored; no Jira ticket
defect scope: pipeline skips phases 2-3 (analysis/architecture) and proceeds directly to phase 4 implementation
